title: Blog post: A glimpse into the circus scene in Belgium
content:
Our Communications Assistant and circus researcher and teacher, Margareeta Lauronen, shares her experiences of Belgium's spring circus scene.

title: Finnish design visitation programme: Fiskars Village Art & Design Biennale and beyond
content:
